string.text: Eliminate the threat to the Monolith's servants' sanctuary
You have been tasked to clear an area from enemies of the Monolith. Report back to Rabbit after the job is done.

%c[ui_8]Brother, I have a mission. The unbelievers are close. Head %c[ui_orange]South%c[ui_8] and destroy them. You may go.\n\n%c[ui_orange][This task will fail if after taking it, the player goes to a location where this task is not available]
Mission complete? Good. The Monolith values the loyalty of its servants.
Eliminate enemies who threaten the Monolith
I have a mission of the highest importance. You must destroy the camp of enemies of the Monolith who dared to the almighty Monolith. Report back to Rabbit after the job is done.

%c[ui_8]A mission of the highest importance, brother. Destroy the camp of the unbelievers who dared to approach %c[ui_orange]Chernobyl NPP%c[ui_8] - the sacred ground of the Monolith. A treachery that we will punish harshly. Delay is unacceptable! Depart.\n\n%c[ui_orange][This task will fail if after taking it, the player goes to a location where this task is not available]
Good. The Monolith values the loyalty and valor of its servants.
Eliminate the enemies of the Monolith
You have been tasked to to eliminate the enemies of the Monolith at the specified location. Report back to Rabbit after the job is done.

%c[ui_8]I have a mission for you, brother. Destroy the camp of the unbelievers so our brothers can establish themselves there. Are you prepared to serve?\n\n%c[ui_orange][This task will fail if after taking it, the player goes to a location where this task is not available]
Did you succeed? Good. Praise Monolith.
Eliminate the enemies of the Monolith
You have been tasked to to eliminate the enemies of the Monolith at the specified location. Report back to Rabbit after the job is done.

%c[ui_8]I have a mission for you, brother. Destroy the camp of the unbelievers so our brothers can establish themselves there. Are you prepared to serve?\n\n%c[ui_orange][This task will fail if after taking it, the player goes to a location where this task is not available]
Did you succeed? Good. Praise Monolith.
Kill the enemy of the Monolith
Find and eliminate the enemy of the Monolith who seeks to touch the Monolith.
%c[ui_8]The Voice has pointed out the unbeliever who has scouted the path to the Monolith. Your mission is to destroy this worm who dared to seek to touch the Monolith! Depart.
You have done well. The brothers are proud of you.
Vengeance upon the enemies of the Monolith!
Collect %s from killed enemies of the Monolith for Rabbit.
Deal with the enemies of the Monolith and bring their patches as proof.

%c[ui_8]The unbelievers dared to approach and attack us. Several brothers have fallen in the name of the Monolith. Go and repay the unbelievers - destroy their comrades. %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8] from their bodies will be proof that the will of the Monolith has been fulfilled.
You have succeeded, brother. Praise the Monolith.
Wild Game Meat for Rabbit
Hunt for and field dress %s. Return the meat to Rabbit so he may prepare it.
Our provisions run low. You must go out into the Zone and hunt for meat so that your Monolith brothers may feast.
%c[ui_8]Hunt for and bring us %c[ui_orange]%s%c[default]. Remember these creatures are a gift of the Zone. Kill them swiftly and give thanks. Return the meat to me when you have succeeded.
You have succeeded in your task. Well done.
Find the %s Artefact for Rabbit
Find the %s artefact. Bring it back to Rabbit so he may prepare it as an offering.
We must find another artefact to give as an offering. Will you help serve the good of the Monolith?
%c[ui_8]We need an artifact to offer as a sacrifice to the Monolith. Find an artefact called %c[ui_orange]%s%c[default]. Bring it to me when you have succeeded so we may conduct the ceremony.
You serve the Monolith well. Join us tonight in the ceremonial offering.
Find %s for Cleric
%s are required by Cleric to install basic equipment upgrades, you should bring them back to him if you find any.
I need you to do something for me. I need specific tools to tune our weapons.
%c[ui_8]Okay, I need a set of %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8]. It should contain what I need. If you can bring some back for me I will be grateful, I will even offer you a discount from here on out.
You've done well. Now go.
Find %s for Cleric
%s are required by Cleric to install advanced equipment upgrades, you should bring them back to him if you find any.
I need some more tools; better tools. Can you find what I ask, again?
%c[ui_8]I need a set of %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8]. It should contain what I need. If you can bring some back for me I will be grateful, I will even offer you a discount from here on out.
Good. The brothers are proud of you.
Find %s for Cleric
%s are required by Cleric to install expert equipment upgrades, you should bring them back to him if you find any.
I need some more tools; better tools. Can you find what I ask, again?
%c[ui_8]I need a set of %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8]. It should contain what I need. If you can bring some back for me I will be grateful, I will even offer you a discount from here on out.
Good. Praise Monolith.
Find %s for Cleric
Cleric has requested a new rifle to add to the Monolith arsenal.
I need a certain gun. Can you find it for me.

%c[ui_8]I need a weapon, brother. I am seeking %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8]. The state of the weapon must be worthy of the Monolith. %c[ui_orange]Gunsmith kit%c[ui_8] will allow you to improve its condition. Or I can assist, but in return, I will accept donations in honor of the Monolith...
The Monolith values the loyalty of its servants..
Take the folder from the stash and deliver it to Cleric
Go to the specified location, take the folder with documents from the stash, and bring it to Cleric.
%c[ui_8]The enemies of the Monolith committed treachery and took what did not belong to them. The brothers made them talk and have learned where it's hidden. Go. Bring it back.
You did well. The Monolith guided you.
Bring Alcohol for the Monolith medic
Collect %s and bring it to the Monolith medic, so he can use it for wound disinfection.
I need more alcohol for wound disinfection. I will pay you if you bring me some.
%c[ui_8]I need more alcohol for wound disinfection. I will pay you well if you bring me some. %c[ui_orange]%s%c[default] would be ideal.
Perfect, exactly what I needed. Thank you!
Find the %s artefact for Physician
Physician has asked you to find a rare artefact called the %s.
We need an artifact that heals wounds. Find it.
%c[ui_8]We need an artifact that heals wounds, called the %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8]. You can find it - the Zone is on your side, brother. Now go.
Did you find it? Praise the Monolith.
